mapper.select: SELECT MEMBER_NO, MEMBER_EMAIL, MEMBER_PW, MEMBER_TEL, MEMBER_ROLE, AUTHOR_LEVEL, LOGIN_TYPE, ENROLL_DATE, MEMBER_DEL_FL, WITHDRAWAL_DATE FROM "MEMBER" WHERE MEMBER_EMAIL = #{memberEmail} AND MEMBER_DEL_FL = 'N'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO "MEMBER" ( MEMBER_NO, MEMBER_EMAIL, MEMBER_PW, MEMBER_TEL, ENROLL_DATE, MEMBER_DEL_FL, AUTHOR_LEVEL, MEMBER_ROLE, LOGIN_TYPE ) VALUES ( SEQ_MEMBER_NO.NEXTVAL, #{memberEmail}, #{memberPw}, #{memberTel}, DEFAULT, DEFAULT, NVL(#{authorLevel}, 1), NVL(#{memberRole}, 'MEMBER'), NVL(#{loginType}, 'NORMAL') )
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM "MEMBER" WHERE MEMBER_TEL = #{tel} AND MEMBER_DEL_FL = 'N'

SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM AUCTION WHERE MEMBER_NO = #{memberNo} AND UNVEILING_STATUS = 'UPCOMING') + (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM "ORDER" WHERE MEMBER_NO = #{memberNo} AND ORDER_STATUS = 'READY') AS active_count FROM DUAL
mapper.update: UPDATE "MEMBER" SET MEMBER_DEL_FL = 'Y', WITHDRAWAL_DATE = SYSDATE WHERE MEMBER_NO = #{memberNo}
mapper.select: SELECT MEMBER_NO, MEMBER_EMAIL, MEMBER_TEL, MEMBER_ROLE, AUTHOR_LEVEL, LOGIN_TYPE, ENROLL_DATE, MEMBER_DEL_FL, WITHDRAWAL_DATE FROM "MEMBER" WHERE MEMBER_EMAIL = #{memberEmail} AND MEMBER_DEL_FL = 'N'
SELECT * FROM "MEMBER" WHERE MEMBER_EMAIL = #{email} AND MEMBER_DEL_FL = 'N'
mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_MEMBER_NO.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO "MEMBER" ( MEMBER_NO, MEMBER_EMAIL, MEMBER_PW, MEMBER_TEL, MEMBER_ROLE, AUTHOR_LEVEL, LOGIN_TYPE, ENROLL_DATE, MEMBER_DEL_FL ) VALUES ( #{memberNo}, #{memberEmail}, #{memberPw}, #{memberTel}, NVL(#{memberRole}, 'MEMBER'), NVL(#{authorLevel}, 1), NVL(#{loginType}, 'NORMAL'), SYSDATE, 'N' )
